mapper.select:
SELECT gamniverse_profile_seq AS gamniverseProfileSeq, profile_name AS profileName, sort_order AS sortOrder, rank_code AS rankCode, affiliation_code AS affiliationCode, broadcast_link AS broadcastLink, soop_broadcast_link AS soopBroadcastLink, instagram_url AS instagramUrl, youtube_url AS youtubeUrl, cafe_link AS cafeLink, profile_image_file_seq AS profileImageFileSeq, profile_rows_json AS profileRowsJson, use_yn AS useYn, DATE_FORMAT(create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt FROM gamniverse_profile
ORDER BY
profile_name sort_order modify_dt sort_order
DESC ASC , gamniverse_profile_seq ASC LIMIT #{safeSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT gamniverse_profile_seq AS gamniverseProfileSeq, profile_name AS profileName, sort_order AS sortOrder, rank_code AS rankCode, affiliation_code AS affiliationCode, broadcast_link AS broadcastLink, soop_broadcast_link AS soopBroadcastLink, instagram_url AS instagramUrl, youtube_url AS youtubeUrl, cafe_link AS cafeLink, profile_image_file_seq AS profileImageFileSeq, profile_rows_json AS profileRowsJson, use_yn AS useYn, DATE_FORMAT(create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt FROM gamniverse_profile WHERE gamniverse_profile_seq = #{gamniverseProfileSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gamniverse_profile ( profile_name, sort_order, rank_code, affiliation_code, broadcast_link, soop_broadcast_link, instagram_url, youtube_url, cafe_link, profile_image_file_seq, profile_rows_json, use_yn, create_dt, modify_dt ) VALUES ( #{profileName}, #{sortOrder}, #{rankCode}, #{affiliationCode}, #{broadcastLink}, #{soopBroadcastLink}, #{instagramUrl}, #{youtubeUrl}, #{cafeLink}, #{profileImageFileSeq}, #{profileRowsJson}, #{useYn}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE gamniverse_profile SET profile_name = #{profileName}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, rank_code = #{rankCode}, affiliation_code = #{affiliationCode}, broadcast_link = #{broadcastLink}, soop_broadcast_link = #{soopBroadcastLink}, instagram_url = #{instagramUrl}, youtube_url = #{youtubeUrl}, cafe_link = #{cafeLink}, profile_image_file_seq = #{profileImageFileSeq}, profile_rows_json = #{profileRowsJson}, use_yn = #{useYn}, modify_dt = NOW() WHERE gamniverse_profile_seq = #{gamniverseProfileSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE gamniverse_profile SET use_yn = 'N', modify_dt = NOW() WHERE gamniverse_profile_seq = #{gamniverseProfileSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
